=== RUN   TestSimpleExtTestSuite
=== RUN   TestSimpleExtTestSuite/TestValueIsSet
--- PASS: TestSimpleExtTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- PASS: TestSimpleExtTestSuite/TestValueIsSet (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   TestSimpleTestSuite
=== RUN   TestSimpleTestSuite/TestLength
=== RUN   TestSimpleTestSuite/TestContains
--- PASS: TestSimpleTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- PASS: TestSimpleTestSuite/TestLength (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- PASS: TestSimpleTestSuite/TestContains (<TIMESTAMP>)
PASS
ok  	github.com/mvrahden/go-test/examples/simple_suite	<TIMESTAMP>
